other_observers: None; Original finder was a participent of the Penrose CBC. Seen by several others.
specific_location: 12/16 and 12/23 Pond and field along Ash St. 12/31 Centennial Park
description: When seen with American Wigeons, similar in size. Gray body. Pinkish breast. Rufous head with tan cap. Blue bill with dark tip. Axillaries grayish, not white.Behaviors: 12/16 Seen in small pond with other ducks.  12/23 Seen in wet field with other ducks, probably feeding.  12/31 Seen grazing on park lawn with dozens of American Wigeons.Call: NonePlumage: Adult
